hints.text: Two coral atolls, Australian territory — **counts as Australia** in streaks

shared_with.note: Christmas Island is far more forested & hilly.
shared_with.diff: Flat white-sand atoll → Cocos; jungle → Christmas Island.

hints.text: **Car = island**: West Island = unique car w/ **front-right snorkel** + bed edges visible; Bantam = white car w/ rear edges visible (may be fully blurred)
**Bantam Village** = cross-hatched brick pavement; the **runway** = widest paved 'road', mowed grass both sides + a follow car

Many **coastal trekkers** (white sand, ocean one side / palms the other); **Direction Island** = noticeably littered beaches (bricks, styrofoam, dead coral) + palm-filled inland; **Horsburgh Island** (Pulau Luar) inland trekker = dry yellow grass + sparse vegetation
**Boats**: medium boat w/ big seating → West Island↔Bantam; small boat w/ black rear bars → north; small dark-grey boat w/ a woman at the back → south
